ASSIGNED TO D604 FOR JURY TRIAL. JUDGE DAVID BALLATI. CLERK: BARBARA HING. COURT REPORTER: SUSAN LEE. OFF THE RECORD, AND OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF COUNSEL, 60 PROSPECTIVEJURORS WERE ORDERED TO RETURN TO THE COURTROOM FRIDAY, OCTOBER 5, 2001 AT 10:00 AM FOR JURY VOIR DIRE. ON AND OFF THE RECORD, THE COURT CONFERRED WITH COUNSEL RE TRIAL PROCEDURES. THE MATTER IS ORDERED CONTINUED TO FRIDAY, OCTOBER 5, 2001, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 604.

SPECIAL VERDICT REACHED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. QUESTION ONE WAS DEFENDANT GUANG WUEN CHEN NEGLIGENT. ANSWER TO NO. 1: YES. IF YOU ANSWER QUESTION ONE, YES, THEN ANSWER QUESTION # 2. QUESTION NUMBER TWO, WAS SUCH NEGLIGENCE A SUBSTANTIAL FACTOR IN CAUSING INJURIES AND DAMAGES TO PLTF. JUDITH CAMELLO? ANSWER "YES" OR "NO" BY MARKING THIS FORM. ANSWER TO QUESTION NO. 2: NO.
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, GUANG WUEN
